hero_subtitle: Compassionate in-home care that helps individuals stay safe, comfortable, and independent.
why_title: Why Families Trust Domira Home Care
svc1_desc: Hands-on support with bathing, grooming, dressing, toileting, mobility assistance, transfers, and positioning.
svc2_desc: Engaging conversation, safety supervision, routine accompaniment, and attentive non-clinical monitoring.
svc3_desc: Meal planning and preparation, light housekeeping, laundry, grocery shopping, and kitchen cleanup.
svc4_desc: Temporary relief for family caregivers so they can rest, recharge, and take care of their own well-being.
svc5_desc: Post-hospital and post-surgery support to help clients recover safely and comfortably at home.
svc6_desc: Around-the-clock support including overnight supervision and extended-hour caregiving.
faq1_a: In most cases, we can begin services within 24-48 hours of completing a care assessment. For urgent situations, we do our best to accommodate same-day or next-day starts.
faq2_q: Is home care the same as medical care?
faq2_a: No. Domira Home Care provides non-medical personal assistant services. We help with daily living activities like bathing, dressing, meal preparation, and companionship. We do not provide skilled nursing, therapy, or medical treatments.
faq3_q: Can care be scheduled just a few hours per week?
faq3_a: Absolutely. We offer flexible scheduling from just a few hours a week to 24/7 live-in care. We'll work with you to build a schedule that fits your needs and budget.
faq4_a: Yes, we offer overnight and extended-hour care for clients who need support during nighttime hours. This includes supervision, toileting assistance, and safety monitoring.
faq5_q: Does long-term care insurance cover home care?
faq5_a: Many long-term care insurance policies cover non-medical home care services. We can help you understand your policy and navigate the claims process. Contact us for a free benefits review.
faq6_a: All Domira caregivers undergo thorough background checks, reference verification, and skills assessment. We carefully match caregivers to clients based on personality, experience, and care needs.
faq7_q: What if I don't get along with my caregiver?
faq7_a: We understand that fit matters. If a caregiver isn't the right match, we'll promptly reassign a new caregiver at no additional cost. Your comfort and trust are our priority.
faq8_a: We currently serve Frisco, Plano, McKinney, Prosper, Little Elm, Aubrey, The Colony, Dallas, and surrounding North Texas communities. Contact us to confirm service in your area.
